methods.description: Innovations to improve upon selection using cross-validation by implementing the 'bootstrapped LASSO', which replaces LASSO support estimates with an intersection of many estimates.

steps.description: Implement the ‘bootstrapped LASSO’ which replaces LASSO support estimates ˆSλ with an intersection of many estimates ˆSλ1, ..., ˆSλ.
steps.searchable_summary: implement bootstrapped LASSO to replace LASSO support estimates with intersection of multiple estimates

methods.description: A factorial design study with varying levels of process dimensions and sparsity, generating multiple datasets for analysis.

steps.description: Generate factorial design with three levels of process dimensions (M = 10, 15, 20) and three levels of sparsity (s = 0.01, 0.02, 0.05).
steps.searchable_summary: generate factorial design with specified dimensions and sparsity levels

steps.description: For each factorial combination of sparsity and dimension, generate 10 different A matrices.
steps.searchable_summary: generate 10 A matrices for each combination of sparsity and dimension

steps.description: For each distinct parameter matrix A, consider three data realization lengths T = 500, 1000, 2000; simulate 5 process realizations of each length.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate process realizations for each A matrix and data length

steps.description: Calculate the total number of datasets simulated as 5 × 3 × 10 × 3 × 3 = 1350.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate total number of datasets simulated
